reviews.comment:
Estacion bien puesta, con buen shop en la mitad de la nada, parada casi obligada.

(Translated by Google)
Well-located station, with a good shop in the middle of nowhere, a near-obligatory stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzN0pTY3l3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lerdos,!!!! para atender, pero amables

(Translated by Google)
Slow to help, but friendly
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzckpQeDZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estan en el lugar justo...ni antes ni despues...tenes que cargar combustible para llegar a tu destino sin sufrir..asi te alcance con lo que tenes ...los combustibles son de primera...

(Translated by Google)
They're in the perfect spot...not too early, not too late...you need to fill up to reach your destination without worrying...even if you have enough fuel...the fuel is top-notch...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzck5uYUNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Después de la interminable ruta 60 encontrarse con una estación de servicio con los baños limpios y un buen café lo es todo.

(Translated by Google)
After the endless Route 60, finding a gas station with clean restrooms and good coffee is everything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzNU9mb3RBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para comer algo y seguir. El cafe espectacular

(Translated by Google)
A great place to grab a bite and keep going. The coffee is spectacular.
